posts.author: carolw (Carol W)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, please see my scenario and 2 questions that follow:

Scenario:
Project 1
Task 1
Task 2

Project 2
Task 4
Task 5

Question 1: can I set up the following integrations using ZAPIER or another tool that does not require a developer:

  1. “Task 2” work item to be created in DevOps automatically at the same time that it is created in Monday.com, with assignment to the same person and deadline.
  2. “Task 2” status to be automatically updated in Monday.com when it is updated in DevOps

Question 2: Do I have to set up this integration per project (i.e. separately for Project 1 and Project 2), or only once. Each project is on a different board in Monday.
